name: structural-overlap-ejection
description: Verify a wall block overlapping the character becomes structural failure and ejects outward without moving the character.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=15,WallLevel=1,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local target=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks']:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R01') assert(target,'missing target block') local before=root.Position root.CFrame=target.CFrame root.Anchored=true task.wait(0.45) local result={before=tostring(before),after=tostring(root.Position),drift=(root.Position-before).Magnitude,detached=target:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached'),failure=target:GetAttribute('StructuralFailure'),falling=target:GetAttribute('StructuralFalling'),ejectAt=target:GetAttribute('LastOverlapEjectAt') or 0,velocity=target.AssemblyLinearVelocity.Magnitude,blockDistance=(target.Position-root.Position).Magnitude} root.Anchored=false return H:JSONEncode(result)

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local target=workspace.PunchWallRPG['Depth Blocks']:FindFirstChild('DepthBlock_L001_C06_R01') return H:JSONEncode({detached=target:GetAttribute('StructuralDetached'),failure=target:GetAttribute('StructuralFailure'),ejectAt=target:GetAttribute('LastOverlapEjectAt') or 0,velocity=target:GetAttribute('LastOverlapEjectSpeed') or target.AssemblyLinearVelocity.Magnitude,rootAnchored=root.Anchored})
